description: Report of death of a Jewish woman. In Arabic script. The deceased is Fakhriyya bt. Abū l-Faraj b. Bū Saʿīd. Her father, Abū l-Faraj, will inherit her possessions. The document is witnessed and signed by Abū l-Ghamr b. Maʿālī and by Mufaḍḍal b. al-Dayyān al-Maskīl (or perhaps al-Rabbān al-Maskīl as Khan has it). Dated: Wednesday, 11 Jumādā II 697 AH, which is 26 March 1298 CE.
description_he: דו"ח מות של אישה יהודייה בכתב ערבי; הנפטרת פח'ריה בת אבו אל-פרג'; מתוארך: רביעי, 11 לג'מאדא ת'אני 697 להיג'רה = 26 במרץ 1298 לספירה
